_comment: Copy to config.json and edit. Every field is optional — env vars override anything you set here. Delete this comment in your real config.

_brands_multi_example.label: Acme Corp
_brands_multi_example.founder_headline: Founder · Building the future of widgets

auth._comment: Optional shared-secret. When set, all POST/PATCH/PUT/DELETE /api/* requests must send Authorization: Bearer <write_token>. Reads stay open (put the desk behind a proxy for read ACLs). The UI prompts for the token on first visit and stores it in localStorage.
